# Society Pages

Miss Thornton was seen at the races. Mr. Thornton spoke of nothing else for days.
The Thornton family had long been fixtures of the county set.

# Split Chapter Notes

## Chapter Iv

The elder Thornton brother argued politics until supper. Young Thornton fell asleep.
Miss Thornton yawned and asked for tea. The conversation turned to horses again.

## Chapter Iv

A footman delivered the reply at dawn. The envelope smelled of wax and lavender.

We regret we cannot attend your assembly. Perhaps in the spring.

SARAH THORNTON.

No other Thornton signed the household correspondence that week.
